name: obsidian-wiki-weaver
description: Build and review an AI-assisted wiki from your vault.

scripts.version: node ./version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json package.json package-lock.json apps/obsidian-plugin/manifest.json apps/obsidian-plugin/package.json apps/obsidian-plugin/package-lock.json apps/mcp-server/package.json apps/mcp-server/package-lock.json packages/core/package.json packages/core/package-lock.json
